meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Scale Freelance Apps Fast (Expert Guide)
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' barrier. Learn to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end, scalable software for your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop building generic CRUD apps. By integrating Antigravity for rapid UI architecture and Claude Code for iterative logic refinement, you transform from a manual coder into a high-velocity AI architect. This workflow allows you to prototype complex, production-ready features in hours, not weeks, significantly increasing your freelance billable value.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with another boilerplate interface—a standard dashboard that looks exactly like the last one you shipped. You’re stuck in the 'basic app' loop, where your technical skill is high, but your execution speed is hampered by the friction of repetitive UI/UX scaffolding. Clients want innovation, but you're too busy fighting syntax to deliver the 'wow' factor they pay for.

There is a better way. By treating AI as your lead engineer, you can offload the heavy lifting of design systems and complex state management. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about architecting high-end solutions that elevate your freelance brand from a commodity service to a premium digital product studio.

steps.title: Architecting the Design System
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation. Use Antigravity to define your component library structure to ensure consistency across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular design system architecture using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI. Focus on a primary/secondary color palette, spacing tokens, and responsive layout primitives optimized for SaaS dashboards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project design system based on generated tokens'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Generation
steps.description: Automate the creation of complex UI layouts that usually take hours to hand-code, allowing you to focus on business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity 'Advanced Data Table' component with server-side filtering, sorting, and row expansion capabilities. Ensure it is accessible and fully typed in TypeScript.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement data table component and integrate with existing design system'

steps.title: Implementing AI-Driven State Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to manage complex application states, ensuring your app logic is decoupled and testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define the state machine logic for a multi-step onboarding flow. Handle loading, error, and success states with clear TypeScript interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate state machine logic for onboarding and apply to current router'

steps.title: API Integration and Schema Mapping
steps.description: Bridge the gap between your frontend and your backend services without getting bogged down in boilerplate network requests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a type-safe API client layer that maps the backend response schemas to the frontend interfaces defined in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate API client wrapper with Zod schema validation'

steps.title: Production-Grade Optimization
steps.description: Perform a final audit and refactor to ensure your code is performant, clean, and ready for client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review on the current project. Identify performance bottlenecks in rendering and suggest refactors for React hooks and memoization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit performance and apply suggested memoization refactors'

pro_tips: Always define a 'Global Style Token' file before generating components to prevent style drift across your freelance projects.
Use Claude Code's context window to store your client's specific brand guidelines, ensuring every generated component matches their visual identity.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'Engineering Specs' rather than 'Requests' to get higher-quality, more modular code outputs.
Run a 'Clean-up' pass using Claude Code after every major feature build to remove unused imports and consolidate duplicate types.
Maintain a private repository of your 'best-in-class' Antigravity prompt templates to reduce your setup time on new client projects to under 10 minutes.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, perform a user feedback loop analysis. Use Claude Code to ingest user feedback logs and suggest specific UI improvements based on real-world usage patterns.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop building basic apps and start shipping premium software that commands premium rates. Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start focusing on high-value architecture. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
